title: Coelogyne pterogyne
taxonomy: Coelogyne pterogyne is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This family is widely recognized as one of the largest and most diverse groups of flowering plants in the world. Within the Orchidaceae family, Coelogyne pterogyne is classified as a genus of sympodial epiphytes, which are plants that grow on other surfaces, such as trees. The genus Coelogyne itself is further divided into several species, each with unique characteristics and features. Coelogyne pterogyne is specifically classified within the subgenus Coelogyne, which contains many species of orchids that are native to tropical regions.
